description: Cloud Private Catalog Producer is a Google Cloud service for managing and sharing private enterprise catalogs and their products within an organization. It is part of Google Cloud Service Catalog administration workflows.
summary: 1 HTTP API: Google Cloud Private Catalog Producer API on `cloudprivatecatalogproducer.googleapis.com`, authenticated with Google Cloud credentials via ADC/OAuth 2.0; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface found for this domain.
